title: MC - diamond dimension
description: This modification introduces a range of diamond items. The mod features a variety of diamond-based items. It was developed a long time ago and was one of the first mods created by me. Simply, the mod is just a bunch of crap. :)
body:
1.1.0 - release coming soon
1.18 coming soon
